name: Carrot & Zucchini Julienne
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut carrots and zucchini into 1/8 inch thick julienne strips.
2. Place a steamer basket over boiling water and cook carrots, covered, until crisp-tender for 3 minutes. Remove to a bowl and keep warm.
3. Steam zucchini, covered, until crisp-tender for 1 minute and add the cooked carrots.
4. Heat butter, lemon juice, salt, and pepper; stir into vegetables.
5. Sprinkle with poppy seeds and serve.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 47; CHO: 3mg; CAR: 6g; PRO: 2g; SOD: 108mg; FAT: 3g
